{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220745052E7984AB37BC60504FAC"}"},"total":2564},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610396912400581438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"牛逼，真的牛逼。一开始我是抱着爽文的名义去看这本书的，渐渐被文笔吸引。如果剧情满分十分我只能给到7分，但文笔真的拉满了。处处是铺垫，一句句诗句贴合有富有深意。给我一种在看蛊真人和剑来的即视感，那句冬天把色彩埋藏起来给春天，真的很震撼，一语三关，讲景讲人讲事。作者，你绝对是学文的吧，绝对是吧[书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771935722,"group_id":"7553950244984065086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"萝莉，嘿嘿，萝莉萝莉~我才不是萝莉控！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/PBV19Di9GIrWTLAEjgF61bD8kNSoqZjqaVs0pv9QO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73bff1967cfe4200af75df01a5a8adee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709694&x-signature=IoaZ%2FY8SOXwgMCXnRwYwRqwRDJ8%3D","user_id":"3549689057116926","user_name":"威廉姆克特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3549689057116926","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":151,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7553950244984065086","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像+无女主+无敌+快节奏+越看越好看+非脸谱化】
（每个角色都有自己的特色）
燕倾穿越到了一部名为《武动九霄》的热血动漫里。
身份：魔门第一天骄。
原定结局：当舔狗给情敌送灵根，然后被羞辱至死。
面对如此炮灰的结局，燕倾怒了。
在一系列的骚操作下，他的人气节节拔高，断层领先！
正道：此子不死，正道无光……不对，他好像比我们还正?
魔道：此子不死，魔道无光……不对，他好像就是魔门?
邪道：此子不死，邪道无光……不对，他怎么这么强？！
陆小凡(男主角)：燕师兄就是我心中唯一的光！
楚瑶(女主角)：他不一样。
云灵儿：师兄是这世界上最好的人！
观众：燕倾就是本剧唯一的白月光！
制作组要逼他黑化，燕倾反手给自己安排了一场惊天地泣鬼神的假死。
那一日，全球观众泪崩，制作组官网被冲烂，服务器瘫痪。
【我就把话撂这儿！三天内不复活燕倾，我明天就组团去你们公司门口拉横幅！我看你们是不想干了！】
【举报！恶意谋杀！主角团都没死，凭什么配角死了！这不公平！】
【制作组连夜跑路吧，全球观众正在锁定你们的IP地址！】
制作组慌了！
“复活燕倾，这是命令，不是商量！”
“可燕倾本来就没死啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9598cff7e9abbcc1ef3a47ba57b76c5f","author":"橘子酸酸","author_id":"","book_id":"7553950244984065086","book_name":"炮灰人气太高，制作组跪求我别死","book_short_name":"请师兄斩神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7553950934586376766","read_count":"95244","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"953777"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"442","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,无敌,无女主,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/31339c57a86c9232875713fcbad9316f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320705&x-signature=z3L4eJtqVSdN6nb5sYBMq4%2F9BTY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104200552794","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"235"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220745052E7984AB37BC60504FAC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11644,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20309,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8294},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608163840165036824","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到番外篇，我敢说放心看，主角不圣母不恶毒，每个人人设都超级恰当，剧情顺畅快速，作者文笔特别好。写刀子的部分玩家的反应也用了夸张手法，明显突出了主角的人气
燕倾就是纯纯白月光啊，立flag那段给我看爽了，而且临死之前的战斗还帮助了自己熟悉的人，各留下一句激励的话
番外篇与道友一起叩天门也十分燃，在此之前我从未见过有主角能带着三十几个不相识的同伴向成功进发的，这是第一本，使人眼前一亮。里面有些语句还和第一部里面呼应，明明是正文和前传，衔接却相当好
圣宗的描写合理，把主角身为魔修却如此正义的原因写清楚了，邪道，魔道和仙道区分的很清楚，作者还有错就改
总之写的很好，继续加油，给五星好评支持一下[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":89,"s":86,"text":"白月光","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413670560504FAC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608163840165036824%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227553950244984065086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771415509,"group_id":"7553950244984065086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"君行阡陌，繁花铺锦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzVtTOBeqVOfhFFqeI0D0fdsDMWV/w2rkGw52G+2O3Y/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6cdd26edfd06437891c135810db3a85a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703288&x-signature=%2F%2BWWj3AnsI8S2OmGaoX97hD3hc8%3D","user_id":"2806430708295372","user_name":"__陌路离殇丶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2806430708295372","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":2,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739114286,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7553950244984065086","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像+无女主+无敌+快节奏+越看越好看+非脸谱化】
